embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

embedding.baseURL.label: OpenAI Base URL
embedding.baseURL.help: Base URL for OpenAI API (default is https://api.openai.com)

dbType.label: Database Type
dbType.help: Database type to use: lancedb (local) or supabase (cloud)

dbPath.label: LanceDB Path
dbPath.help: Path to local LanceDB database (only for lancedb type)

supabase.url.label: Supabase URL
supabase.url.help: Supabase project URL (only for supabase type)

supabase.serviceKey.label: Supabase Service Key
supabase.serviceKey.help: Supabase service role key (only for supabase type, or use ${SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY})

scanner.defaultIgnorePaths.label: Default Ignore Paths
scanner.defaultIgnorePaths.help: Default paths to ignore during directory scanning

scanner.customIgnoreRules.label: Custom Ignore Rules
scanner.customIgnoreRules.help: Custom gitignore-style rules for directory scanning

batchProcessing.maxBatchSize.label: Max Batch Size
batchProcessing.maxBatchSize.help: Maximum number of items to process in a single batch

batchProcessing.concurrency.label: Concurrency
batchProcessing.concurrency.help: Number of concurrent requests for embedding generation

batchProcessing.retryAttempts.label: Retry Attempts
batchProcessing.retryAttempts.help: Number of retries for failed embedding requests

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

recallIncludeDocuments.label: Recall Include Documents
recallIncludeDocuments.help: Include scanned document data in auto-recall results

captureMaxChars.label: Capture Max Chars
captureMaxChars.help: Maximum message length eligible for auto-capture
